author: Khoa Phan
name: Crawler Transformer 3f+2cx2 d=832 — Mixed Int5 GPTQ + Post-Quant TTT (4-hour cluster equivalent)
blurb: Crawler architecture (3 flat + 2 crawler x2 loops, d=832, 47.4M params) trained 120 hours local (4-hour 8xH100 equivalent), mixed int5 flat-attention + int6 rest GPTQ + Brotli (no pruning, 1.25MB budget headroom), post-quant sliding TTT on GPTQ artifact. Validation/scaling study of PR #1817 recipe.
hardware: 1x RTX 6000 Ada 48GB, 120 hours wallclock (equivalent to 4-hour 8xH100 SXM cluster)
